summary: Hydrated preflight shows the original representative #45892 and most job candidates are already closed. No single open canonical safely replaces #45892 for the whole cluster: the remaining live candidates split into distinct gateway shutdown/systemd restart subfamilies. No close, merge, or fix PR action is safe or allowed here. Security-sensitive hydrated refs are routed exactly by ref; the three live non-security PRs are kept open as related follow-up work because each has unique scope plus failing proof/check or unresolved bot-review blockers.
